ddls:
CREATE TABLE "zipcodes" (
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zipcode */,
  "zipcode_type" TEXT /* Type of the zipcode */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the zipcode is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the zipcode is located */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., PRIMARY) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the zipcode's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the zipcode's location */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location string combining city and state */,
  "decommissioned" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the zipcode has been decommissioned */,
  "tax_returns_filed" INTEGER /* Number of tax returns filed in the zipcode */,
  "estimated_population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the zipcode */,
  "total_wages" REAL /* Total wages earned in the zipcode */,
  "average_wage" REAL /* Average wage in the zipcode */,
  "zip_area" REAL /* Area of the zipcode in square miles */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median value of homes in the zipcode */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population in the zipcode */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zipcode"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zipcodes_location_type FOREIGN KEY ("location_type") REFERENCES location_types ("location_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zipcodes_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zipcodes_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square miles */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the city */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median household income in the city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median household income in the state */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median value of homes in the state */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_types" (
  "location_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location type */,
  "location_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the location type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location type */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is the default location type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_data" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax data entry */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Reference to the zipcode */,
  "tax_returns_filed" INTEGER /* Number of tax returns filed in the zipcode */,
  "total_tax_revenue" REAL /* Total tax revenue generated in the zipcode */,
  "average_tax_per_return" REAL /* Average tax paid per return */,
  "total_deductions" REAL /* Total deductions claimed in the zipcode */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_data_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zipcodes ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data entry */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Reference to the zipcode */,
  "estimated_population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the zipcode */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the zipcode */,
  "household_income" REAL /* Average household income in the zipcode */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population in the zipcode */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median value of homes in the zipcode */,
  "race_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of races in the zipcode */,
  "education_levels" TEXT /* Distribution of education levels in the zipcode */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zipcodes ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "economy" (
  "economy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic data entry */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Reference to the zipcode */,
  "total_wages" REAL /* Total wages earned in the zipcode */,
  "average_wage" REAL /* Average wage in the zipcode */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the zipcode */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median household income in the zipcode */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median value of homes in the zipcode */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the zipcode */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economy_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zipcodes ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, planner, policymaker) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* ID of the zipcode being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the access record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zipcodes ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* ID of the zipcode for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., demographic, economic) */,
  "data_summary" TEXT /* Summary of data included in the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the report has been shared with others */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zipcodes ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "zipcode_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Reference to the zipcode */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the historical data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the zipcode in the given year */,
  "total_wages" REAL /* Total wages earned in the zipcode in the given year */,
  "average_wage" REAL /* Average wage in the zipcode in the given year */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median value of homes in the zipcode for the given year */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median household income in the zipcode for the given year */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the historical data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zipcode_history_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zipcodes ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "zipcode_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Reference to the zipcode */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., decommissioned) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the changed field */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the change record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zipcode_changes_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zipcodes ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the economic indicator */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of the economic indicator (e.g., macro, micro) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the indicator data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Reference to the zipcode */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator being predicted */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value of the economic indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the prediction */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the prediction */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zipcodes ("zipcode")
)
